# Sorcerer
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Sorcerer&prop=wikitext

{{Classbox
| desc = The sorcerer uses his scepter to fire blasts of chain lightning at his enemies.
| weaponSlot = Wand
| weapon = Fire Wand
| abilitySlot = Scepter
| ability = Lightning Scepter
| armor = Robe
| armorLink = Robes


| hpStart = 100
| hpLevel = 20 - 30
| hpCap = 670

| mpStart = 100
| mpLevel = 5 - 15
| mpCap = 385

| attStart = 12
| attLevel = 1 - 2
| attCap = 70

| defStart = 0
| defLevel = 0
| defCap = 25

| spdStart = 12
| spdLevel = 1 - 2
| spdCap = 60

| dexStart = 12
| dexLevel = 0 - 2
| dexCap = 60

| vitStart = 10
| vitLevel = 1 - 2
| vitCap = 75

| wisStart = 15
| wisLevel = 1 - 2
| wisCap = 60
}}
